_status: experimental — Antigravity 2.0 (launched 19 May 2026) has not yet published an open plugin manifest spec. This file mirrors the Gemini CLI Extensions format that Antigravity's `agy plugin import gemini` converter accepts. When Antigravity publishes a v2-native plugin manifest spec, this file will be updated to match. See docs/cross-platform-install.md for the current install workflow.
name: contentforge
description: v3.12.3 fixes two production bugs: (1) dual-copy save — finished .docx now also written to user-visible ~/Documents/ContentForge/<brand>/<type>/<YYYY-MM>/ alongside the internal tracking copy, fixing the 'file isn't saving on local drive' report; (2) per-phase checkpointing via scripts/checkpoint-manager.py + new /contentforge:resume command — interrupted pipeline runs resume from the last completed phase instead of restarting from Phase 1. Also new: /contentforge:output-folder command to reveal the visible output folder in the OS file manager. Enterprise content production pipeline — 10-phase workflow, 19 skills, 13 agents, 29-pattern AI-detection humanizer, C2PA provenance for the .docx output (EU AI Act Article 50 compliance), May 2026 AEO/GEO reality. Shared model curator (scripts/model_registry.json + resolve_model.py): aliases like latest-balanced-anthropic / latest-vision-google resolve to concrete ids at call time; deprecated ids auto-fall-forward. See docs/MODEL-CURATOR.md.
